nasb.text: These are the names of the men whom Moses sent to spy out the land; but Moses called Hoshea the son of Nun, Joshua.

esv.text: These were the names of the men whom Moses sent to spy out the land. And Moses called Hoshea the son of Nun Joshua.

cnv.text: 以上是摩西派去窺探那地的人的名字。摩西稱嫩的兒子何西亞為約書亞。

ccb.text: 以上是摩西派去打探迦南的人，他称嫩的儿子何西阿为约书亚。
